events.content:
There are 4 tent models in our catalog that cost at most $300: 
1. Larkspindle 2 (sku: ZO-100)
2. Larkspindle Dome (sku: ZO-104)
3. Duskmere Dome (sku: ZO-103) - Note: This tent has a stock of 12 units.
4. Larkspindle 3 (sku: ZO-107)
5. Hollowfen 2 (sku: ZO-106) - Note: This tent has a stock of 5 units.

FINAL ANSWER: 4
